title: Mighty Imouto Force: Little Sister Edition! (MSF x Oreimo)
description:
My Hooligan Sisters can't be this cute!

Mashup of MSF2's title screen theme and Oreimo's OP.
And yeah, I drew that.

You can find the drawing here: http://stocky6493.deviantart.com/art/Mighty-Imouto-Force-Little-Sister-Edition-598804254
